name: @snabbsajt/cli
description: Local-first command line tools for SnabbSajt site packages.

scripts.typecheck: tsc --ignoreConfig --noEmit --target ES2022 --module ESNext --moduleResolution Bundler --strict --skipLibCheck --types node,vitest/globals src/cli.ts src/commands/site.ts src/commands/site/import-html.ts src/commands/site/import-wordpress.ts src/commands/skills.ts src/skills/install.ts src/skills/detect.ts src/skills/verify.ts test/cli.test.ts test/skills-install.test.ts
